query: Satya Nadella ultimatum top executives commit to AI or leave Microsoft senior leadership report 2026

{"query":"Satya Nadella ultimatum top executives commit to AI or leave Microsoft senior leadership report 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1873,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/microsoft-ceo-satya-nadella-warns-companys-top-leadership-leave-or-sign-on/articleshow/126068828.cms","title":"Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella ‘warns’ company's top leadership: Leave or sign on… - The Times of India","content":"Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is demanding executives fully embrace the company's AI transformation or face departure.
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is delivering a stark message to his top executives: sign on to the company's artificial intelligence transformation or leave, according to internal documents and employee interviews obtained by Business Insider.
The ultimatum comes as Nadella views AI as both an existential threat and Microsoft's biggest opportunity in decades, with the CEO personally conducting conversations with senior leaders about their willingness to embrace the intense workload ahead."Satya is pushing on intensity and urgency," one Microsoft executive told Business Insider, adding that the pressure is forcing some Microsoft veterans to decide whether they want to stay and commit to the mountain of work required.
"You've gotta be asking yourself how much longer you want to do this," the executive added.
Nadella recently promoted Judson Althoff to CEO of the company's commercial business, explicitly to free up the CEO's time for "laser focus" on technical work including datacenter buildout, systems architecture, and AI product innovation, according to an internal memo viewed by Business Insider.
Three Microsoft executives told Business Insider that longtime Office and Windows chief Rajesh Jha has been considering retirement, though his decision remains uncertain given renewed excitement about AI's potential."},{"url":"https://www.businessinsider.com/satya-nadella-microsoft-ai-leadership-reset-2026-5","title":"Microsoft's AI Reboot Reshapes Satya Nadella's Leadership Team - Business Insider","content":"All the while, a quiet campaign was happening within the executive ranks: Nadella asked leaders to sign on for a significant amount of work and a new, more demanding culture — or leave, as Business Insider reported in December.
Amazon CEO Andy Jassy has expanded the company's so-called "S-team" senior leadership team and included lower-level employees closer to the work, such as vice presidents who are two layers removed from the CEO.
Microsoft also has a new Copilot leadership team responsible for Microsoft's AI assistant, made up of Charles Lamanna, Jacob Andreou, and Ryan Roslansky.
One rising star on the engineering leadership team is a Microsoft veteran named Arun Ulag.
While Ulag reports to cloud boss Scott Guthrie, Nadella treats him more like a direct report, one person said.
Correction: May 22, 2026 — An earlier version of this story misstated Yusuf Mehdi's title."},{"url":"https://www.briefs.co/news/satya-nadella-microsoft-leadership-shakeup/","title":"Satya Nadella Killed Microsoft's Senior Leadership Team","content":"The SLT was the group that ran the 220,000-person company for decades.
He built a new inner circle focused on AI, per a Business Insider report this week.
The SLT was Microsoft's old top team.
Rising names in the new team include Charles Lamanna, Jacob Andreou (a Snap vet), Ryan Roslansky (LinkedIn's CEO), and longtime Microsoft engineer Arun Ulag."},{"url":"https://www.financialexpress.com/life/technology-commit-to-ai-or-leave-satya-nadella-sends-clear-message-to-microsofts-top-leadership-report-says-4081843/","title":"‘Commit to AI or leave’: Satya Nadella sends clear message to Microsoft’s top leadership, report says - Technology News | The Financial Express","content":"Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is reportedly urging employees to fully commit to the company’s AI-driven strategy, signaling that those unwilling to adapt may have little room to stay."},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/news/satya-nadella-relinquishes-role-microsoft-104855690.html","title":"Satya Nadella relinquishes his role as Microsoft’s communicator-in-chief—right when he’s needed most","content":"November 18, 2025 3 min read"}]}

People who work closely with the CEO and internal documents revealed to Business Insider who's in, who's out, and how the company's power structure is changing. \"We quietly retired what's known as the SLT,\" said one of the people who works closely with Nadella, referring to the commonly used acronym for senior leadership team — powerful executives who run sprawling businesses and report to the CEO. Microsoft's AI Strategy Restructuring. *Satya Nadella Dismantles Decades Old Senior Leadership Structure to Inject Flatter Startup Agility and Direct Engineering Communication Loops into the Corporate Core*. They are moving fast as well to cut through the old bureaucratic red tape that usually slows down huge operations, and a lot of software giants are rewriting the way they run their leadership.
